chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-2490 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on office objection No.6 2. For order on Misc. No.11363/2024 (Exemption) 3. For hearing of main case 30.9.2025 None present for the petitioner -------------------------------- This is an old petition of 2024, which is over one year ago. It was first taken up on 22.5.2024, which is over one year ago, when none was present for the petitioner without intimation. Since then learned counsel for the petitioner has failed to pursue this petition diligently. Today, once again, none present for the petitioner without intimation. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this old petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith listed application. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
